common.siteDescription: Personal website of Yulting Rinpoche — educator, translator, and Buddhist scholar.

home.title: Yulting Rinpoche
home.subtitle: English-Tibetan Translations & Methodology Teacher
home.bio: A Buddhist scholar, educator, and translator based at Gaden Shartse Monastery. Dedicated to the dissemination of Buddhist teachings and the integration of contemplative practice with modern science.

about.metaDescription: Learn about Yulting Rinpoche — educator, translator, and Buddhist scholar at Gaden Shartse Monastery.
about.bio1: A recognized reincarnated Tulku, born in Nepal in 1994, with a distinguished background in Buddhist philosophy, education, and translation. Adept in both traditional and contemporary educational settings, with a proven record of excellence in monastic studies and cross-cultural communication.
about.bio2: Currently pursuing the Great Gelug Examination (Geshe Lharampa, PhD) at Gaden Shartse Monastery while serving as an educator and translator, committed to the dissemination of Buddhist teachings and the integration of contemplative practice with modern science.
about.job1Detail1: Responsible for teaching English-Tibetan translation classes for the past four years
about.job1Detail2: Facilitates the development of translation proficiency to support monastic education and intercultural understanding
about.job2Detail1: Conducted formal teachings in Buddhist philosophy and contemplative practice
about.job2Detail2: Provided spiritual guidance and mentorship to students, contributing to their academic and personal growth
about.engagement1Desc: Speaker on the integration of contemplative practice and Buddhist psychology
about.engagement2Title: Emory Tibet Science Initiative Summer Program
about.engagement2Desc: Translator facilitating English-Tibetan translation of scientific materials, promoting interdisciplinary learning among monastic scholars
about.engagement3Desc: Translator at various seminars and workshops, supporting the integration of science and Buddhist philosophy
about.currentStudy: Currently pursuing the Great Gelug Examination (Geshe Lharampa, PhD), with four years completed as the top performer each year.
about.contribution1: Conducted teachings and Dharma talks in Singapore, engaging international audiences in Buddhist studies.
about.contribution2: Successfully completed six years of the Comprehensive Science Program at Gaden Shartse Monastery, contributing to the integration of science and Buddhist thought.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Yulting Rinpoche.
contact.intro: Feel free to reach out. I'm always open to conversations about Buddhist philosophy, translation work, and educational collaborations.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using the Yulting Rinpoche website.

terms.s1p1: This website employs the use of cookies. By accessing this website, you agree to use cookies in accordance with our privacy practices.
terms.s1p2: Cookies are used by our website to enable the functionality of certain areas and to make it easier for visitors to use. Some of our third-party integrations may also use cookies.
terms.s2p1: Unless otherwise stated, Yulting Rinpoche and/or licensors own the intellectual property rights for all material on this website. All intellectual property rights are reserved. You may access this for your own personal use subject to the restrictions set in these terms and conditions.

terms.s2l3: Reproduce, duplicate, or copy material from this website

Yulting Rinpoche does not filter, edit, publish, or review comments prior to their presence on the website. Comments do not reflect the views and opinions of Yulting Rinpoche.
terms.s3p2: Yulting Rinpoche reserves the right to monitor all comments and to remove any comments which can be considered inappropriate, offensive, or in breach of these terms and conditions.

terms.s3l4: Comments will not be used to solicit or promote business or present commercial activities or unlawful activity

terms.s4p2: Other organizations may request to link to our website by contacting us. We may consider and approve link requests from commonly-known organizations, educational institutions, and trade associations.
terms.s4p3: No use of our logo or other artwork shall be allowed for linking absent a trademark license agreement.
terms.s5p1: We shall not be held responsible for any content that appears on your website. You agree to protect and defend us against all claims that arise from content appearing on your website. No links should appear on any website that may be interpreted as libelous, obscene, or criminal, or which infringes, otherwise violates, or advocates the infringement or other violation of any third party rights.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Yulting Rinpoche website.
privacy.intro: Yulting Rinpoche is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website. By using this website, you agree to the practices described in this policy.
privacy.s1p1: We may collect information that you voluntarily provide to us, such as your name, email address, and any messages you send through our contact form.
privacy.s1p2: We may also automatically collect certain information when you visit our website, including your browser type, operating system, pages visited, and language preferences.
privacy.s2p1: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
privacy.s2l1: To respond to your inquiries and messages
privacy.s2l2: To improve and maintain our website
privacy.s2l3: To send you updates about teachings, events, or publications (only if you opt in)
privacy.s2l4: To ensure the security and functionality of our website
privacy.s3p1: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties. We may share information only in the following circumstances:
privacy.s3l2: To comply with legal obligations or respond to lawful requests
privacy.s3l3: To protect our rights, privacy, safety, or property
privacy.s4p1: Our website uses cookies and local storage to remember your language preference and theme setting. These are essential for the functionality of the website.
privacy.s4p2: We do not use cookies for tracking or advertising purposes. Third-party services integrated into our website may have their own cookie policies.
privacy.s5l1: Access the personal information we hold about you
privacy.s5l2: Request correction of any inaccurate information
privacy.s5l3: Request deletion of your personal information
privacy.s5l4: Object to the processing of your personal information
privacy.s5p2: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details provided below. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
privacy.s6p1: We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s7p1: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party sites you visit.
privacy.s8p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.s9p1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:
privacy.s9location: Gaden Shartse Monastery, Mundgod, Karnataka, India
